arts.ttl: Liverpool Make Contact With £50m-Rated Striker After Gaining an ‘Edge on Arsenal’
arts.sum: Liverpool are interested in RB Leipzig striker Benjamin Sesko, who is also a target for Arsenal. Arne Slot is eager to replace Darwin Nunez.

arts.ttl: Liverpool, Man United 'learn asking price' for Fulham's assist king ahead of summer transfer window
arts.sum: Liverpool and Manchester United allegedly learn that only offers in excess of £40m would be considered by Fulham for Antonee Robinson.

arts.ttl: PSG star Khvicha Kvaratskhelia sends clear message to Liverpool with bold prediction
arts.sum: PSG are looking to seal their place in the Champions League quarter-finals after losing 1-0 to Liverpool in the last-16 first leg, despite dominating much of the tie against Arne Slot's side

arts.ttl: Liverpool move for Man United target “progressing well”, 24-year-old could help Reds get deal done
arts.sum: Liverpool are looking to sign the Bournemouth defender Milos Kerkez at the end of the season and they will face competition from Manchester United and Real Madrid. The 21-year-old Hungarian left back has attracted the attention of top clubs with his performance in the Premier League. arts.ttl: Liverpool vs Southampton Prediction: Super Salah to shatter another Premier League record?

arts.ttl: “I hear they’ve come to the conclusion”: Liverpool plan for £140k-a-week star revealed
arts.sum: Liverpool are prepared to cash in on Darwin Nunez at the end of the season, if there is a lucrative proposal on the table. arts.ttl: Liverpool team news confirmed as Cody Gakpo decision made and Darwin Nunez starts
arts.sum: Liverpool's team news is confirmed from Anfield as the Premier League leaders host rock-bottom Southampton for the chance to 16 points clear

arts.ttl: Revealed: Real Madrid 'could still pay transfer fee to Liverpool for Trent Alexander-Arnold' - despite the full back's Anfield contract expiring this summer
arts.sum: Real Madrid are ready to pay a fee to get their hands on Trent Alexander-Arnold before his contract expires with Liverpool on June 30, according to a report.
